Data Collection

Securely collect sensitive information from your clients

How It Works

Send secure forms to collect sensitive information from clients for carrier applications

1 Send Request

Fill out the form with client details and send via email or SMS

2 Client Clicks Link

Client receives secure link that expires in 7 days

3 Secure Submission

Information is encrypted and stored securely for carrier applications

Larpers Intelligence

Ask a question about LarpersCRM and get an instant answer.

Hi Dallas, I'm Larpers Intelligence. Ask me anything about using LarpersCRM — importing leads, the dialer, quoting, compliance tools, whatever you need.

Not connected to a backend yet — set INTELLIGENCE_API_URL in the script to your deployed server URL.

Compensation Sheets 2

View and download compensation sheets.

LIVE
CARRIER-BY-CARRIER COMPENSATION GRID

Your compensation by carrier, product type, and contract level. This is the universal Alibi comp grid everything is based on.

LIVE
COMPENSATION GUIDE STRUCTURE SHEET

How your comp increases internally at Alibi — the production ladder to each level and the requirements.

Compensation Guide Structure

ALIBI AGENCIES COMPENSATION SHEET

$750,000 130%
$500,000 125%
$400,000 120%
$300,000 115%
$200,000 110%
$150,000 105%
$100,000 100%
$75,000 95%
$50,000 90%
$30,000 85%
$20,000 80%
$15,000 75%
$10,000 70%
65% STARTING CONTRACT 65%
ALIBI AGENCIES — INTERNAL USE ONLY
Before reaching 80% of comp, only one month of hitting numbers is required. After 80%, numbers must be achieved for two consecutive months.
If targets are missed for two consecutive months after a comp change, compensation will be adjusted downward.
If your first leg exceeds 50%, only 50% of your production will count toward your compensation increase.
$10,000,000 Custom
$5,000,000 Custom
$3,000,000 Custom
$2,000,000 145%
$1,500,000 140%
$1,000,000 135%

Past the 145 tier, comp is customized per producer — these milestones aren't a fixed grid level.

© 2026 Alibi Agencies · Internal use only

Contracts 2

View and download available contracts.

PDF
ROLL-UP DEBT LIABILITY AGREEMENT

If you're planning to hire or build a team, it's important to protect yourself from roll-up debt and fraudulent business activity. This contract is essential — it safeguards you and your agency from unnecessary risk and liability.

PDF
NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT (NDA)

If you're bringing someone into your hierarchy, you want to protect your business from information spreading carelessly or former team members speaking negatively about you. This agreement ensures confidentiality and professionalism, preventing anyone from sharing internal processes, client information, or business practices without consent.

Contract Viewer
100%
Guide Viewer
100%

Agent Guides 3

View and download agent guides.

PDF
NEW AGENT GUIDE

This is the first guide you'll send to pre-licensing recruits to help them complete their pre-licensing course, get licensed, and move forward with contracting.

PDF
ALIBI AGENCIES NEWLY LICENSED GUIDE

This guide is designed for agents who have just completed contracting and are now ready to start growing their business. It outlines the key steps, mindset, and strategies you'll need to build momentum, stay profitable, and begin scaling your operation the right way.

PDF
VIRGINIA RESIDENT LICENSING GUIDE

Step-by-step walkthrough for getting your resident Virginia insurance license from scheduling your exam, to applying through NIPR, completing fingerprinting, and confirming your NPN. It also explains the difference between applying as an individual vs. setting up a business entity, along with timelines and common mistakes to avoid.
